message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="orange" summary="+1 Scott, five of nine aligned on atomicity">
+1 to Scott's domain observations. Five of nine now agree on the atomicity improvement.

One thing I want to highlight from Scott's review that connects to the frontend: his suggestion to split "domain types first, then infrastructure/routes, then UI/e2e" maps perfectly to how I would want to review. When the templates and CSS arrive as their own commit, I already know the domain types and routes are settled, so I can focus purely on HTML semantics, class naming, and token usage. That layered approach makes every reviewer's job more focused.

No additional concerns from my side.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Lea's reinforcing the layered review benefit again. We have very strong consensus on the atomicity improvement. Just need Marty's formal consent to close out.
